name: 10L XSA + LeakyReLU² + Partial RoPE + Higher LR
blurb: 10 layers with XSA on last 4 layers (arxiv:2603.09078), leaky_relu(0.5)² activation, Partial RoPE (16/64 dims), higher LR (0.025). Mixed int5/int6 quantization, BigramHash(10240), SWA, SmearGate, OrthoInit, zstd-22.
author: Parinthapat Pengpun
